---
title: "positiveFinite()"
description: "Clamp a value to a finite positive number."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Clamp a value to a finite positive number.

## Import

```ts
import { positiveFinite } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function positiveFinite(
	value: number,
	fallback: number,
): number
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `number` | Input value. |
| `fallback` | `number` | Value used when input is not finite or non-positive. |

## Returns

A finite, positive number.

## Example

```ts
positiveFinite(0, 12);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/utils.ts`
